title: B1 Listening - Part 1 - Test 5
instructions: For each question, choose the correct picture. You will hear each audio twice.

items.context: You hear student and teacher talking about the lost keys.
items.audio_script: Student: Hi, Sam. I’m checking the plan for the lost keys. I thought we were going to look in the kitchen, but I may have mixed it up after yesterday's message. || Teacher: It changed this morning. Our teacher sent a new note to everyone before registration. [1]I left them on the table in the garden[/1]. || Student: Good thing I asked. I nearly searched the wrong room. I haven’t looked at my phone since breakfast. || Teacher: Don’t worry, there’s still enough time. I’ll wait for you by the entrance, so we can go together.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.text: Hi, Sam. I’m checking the plan for the lost keys. I thought we were going to look in the kitchen, but I may have mixed it up after yesterday's message.

dialogue.speaker: teacher
dialogue.text: It changed this morning. Our teacher sent a new note to everyone before registration. I left them on the table in the garden.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.text: Good thing I asked. I nearly searched the wrong room. I haven’t looked at my phone since breakfast.

dialogue.speaker: teacher
dialogue.text: Don’t worry, there’s still enough time. I’ll wait for you by the entrance, so we can go together.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, garden table with keys on it, no text, flat educational drawing, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, bedroom desk with school bag, no text, flat educational drawing, minimal details, clean white background.

items.explanation: The speaker says: “I left them on the table in the garden.” This matches option B.

items.context: You hear customer and assistant talking about the beach trip.
